title: Comment
description: A comment or reply left by a user on a Figma file. Comments can be pinned to specific locations on the canvas.

file_key.description: The key of the file the comment belongs to.

parent_id.description: If present, the ID of the comment to which this is a reply.

created_at.description: The UTC ISO 8601 time at which the comment was left.

resolved_at.description: If set, the UTC ISO 8601 time the comment was resolved.

order_id.description: Only set for top-level comments. The number displayed with the comment in the UI.

reactions.description: An array of emoji reactions to the comment.
